name: Authentic Guacamole (Hearon)
recipeIngredient: 3 serrano chilies OR 1 jalapeno chili (with seeds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop the flesh from the avocados into a bowl.
2. Add the chopped chilies and season with salt.
3. Mash everything together until it is chunky, but not runny.
4. Taste for seasoning and serve immediately.
Recipe from La Parilla, the Mexican Grill (Chronicle Books) by Read Hearon.
